_comment: Design Manifest Schema Template v1.0 -- Structured inventory of all PDE design artifacts. Generated/updated by each artifact-producing skill on completion. PDE reads this to discover design artifacts during engineering phases.
projectName: string -- project name from design brief
experienceSubType: single-night | multi-day | recurring-series | installation | hybrid-event | null
outputRoot: string -- path to output directory (e.g., ./pde-output or .planning/design)
generatedAt: ISO 8601 timestamp -- when manifest was first created
updatedAt: ISO 8601 timestamp -- when manifest was last modified

artifacts._comment: Each key is an artifact code (e.g., BRF, SYS, WFR-login). Every artifact-producing skill adds/updates its entry here on completion.

BRF._comment: Example entry showing all fields. Each artifact follows this structure.
BRF.name: Design Brief

implementation._comment: PDE planner reads this section to understand how this artifact maps to engineering work.
implementation.notes: Defines product scope, personas, and constraints. Informs all subsequent design and engineering decisions.
Defines navigation structure and user journey. Maps to route architecture.
CSS custom properties defining the visual language. Import as the first stylesheet. All components reference these tokens.
Single-column centered form. Email + password with social login options. Error states for invalid credentials. Redirect to dashboard on success.

tokenDependencyMap._comment: Maps design tokens to the artifacts that use them. Enables staleness tracking: if a token value changes, all dependent artifacts may need updating.

designCoverage._comment: Boolean flags indicating which design artifact types exist. PDE uses this to determine what design context is available for engineering planning.
